basic_summary: Peter Parker is a fictional superhero appearing in American comic books published by Marvel Comics. Peter Parker is the alter ego of Spider-Man, a superhero who has appeared in Marvel Comics since the 1960s. He is a member of the Parker family, which includes Parker's older brother, Miles, and sister, Mary.
translated_summary: Peter Parker es un superhéroe ficticio que aparece en los cómics estadounidenses publicados por Marvel Comics. Peter Parker es el alter ego de Spider-Man, un superhéroe que ha aparecido en Marvel Comics desde los años 60. Es un miembro de la familia Parker, que incluye al hermano mayor de Parker, Miles, y su hermana, Mary.
